evidence_quotes.quote: We want to stop money hungry anti consumer big corporations from killing games when they decide its no longer profitable for them to keep them in a playable state.

paragraphs.text: We want to stop money hungry anti consumer big corporations from killing games when they decide its no longer profitable for them to keep them in a playable state. Stop Killing Games is a pro consumer initiative by European citizens, we have gathered above 1.400.000 petition signatures to stop games from being killed, and support pro consumer rights. Imagine you buy a book and after 5 years of not touching it you decide to finally read it, you open it and everything disappeared, its empty. That is what's happening to hundreds of games we care about, and as more time passes, more games will be endangered.
